app.description: Manage AI relays and your accounts and balances in one place
app.name: All API Hub

actions.allowAndScan: Choose bookmarks and start batch import

bookmarkAccountImport.apiUnavailable: This browser does not expose native bookmarks to the extension.
bookmarkAccountImport.description: Batch scan browser bookmark URLs and review account-site candidates before importing.

failures.detection: Auto-detect could not read this site.
failures.save: The account could not be saved.

bookmarkAccountImport.includeExisting: Include sites that already have saved accounts
bookmarkAccountImport.initialValue: Batch scan browser bookmarks and turn saved relay sites into account candidates. You choose the bookmark folders first, review the candidates before importing, and existing accounts are skipped by default.
bookmarkAccountImport.noCandidates: No importable web bookmark URLs were found.
bookmarkAccountImport.permissionDenied: Bookmark permission was not granted. You can try again without closing this dialog.
bookmarkAccountImport.permissionNeeded: Bookmark access is optional and is requested only for this batch import.
bookmarkAccountImport.readFailed: The browser bookmark tree could not be read.
bookmarkAccountImport.reloadFailed: The import finished, but account data could not be reloaded. Refresh the account list and try again if the new accounts are not visible.
bookmarkAccountImport.scopeHelp: Scanning only creates a preview. You can return here to adjust the selection before importing.

status.duplicate_one: Skipped by default. Existing saved-account match count: {{count}}
status.duplicate_other: Skipped by default. Existing saved-account match count: {{count}}

bookmarkAccountImport.title: Import accounts from bookmarks

ccswitch.description: Send this provider configuration directly to CC Switch via deep link

descriptions.model: When available, models are loaded from /v1/models for selection. You can also type a custom model id.

notices.hermes: CC Switch imports Hermes using the Chat Completions protocol. During export, the provider name is converted to a valid identifier containing only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. To use another format, such as Anthropic Messages or Codex Responses, adjust it in CC Switch after import.
notices.openclaw: CC Switch currently does not support configuring OpenClaw AI service API formats through external import. Adjust it in CC Switch after import if needed.
notices.opencode: CC Switch currently does not support configuring OpenCode AI service API formats through external import. Adjust it in CC Switch after import if needed.

ccswitch.title: Export to CC Switch

claudeCodeRouter.description: Create or update a provider in Claude Code Router. Models are required.

descriptions.models: Enter one model per line or separate by commas.
descriptions.providerApiBaseUrl: This should be the full /v1/chat/completions endpoint.
descriptions.restartAfterSave: Router may require restart for config changes to take effect.

claudeCodeRouter.title: Import to Claude Code Router

cliproxy.description: Create or update a provider entry in CLIProxyAPI.

descriptions.baseUrlClaudeApiKey: Usually the Anthropic API root URL without /v1/messages.
descriptions.baseUrlCodexApiKey: Usually the provider root URL. A common default is https://api.openai.com.
descriptions.baseUrlGeminiApiKey: Usually the Gemini API root URL without /v1/models/....
descriptions.baseUrlOpenAICompatibility: Usually the upstream OpenAI-compatible base URL ending in /v1.
descriptions.models: Map upstream model names to optional aliases (name -> alias). When available, upstream models are loaded from /v1/models for selection.
descriptions.modelsManual: Map upstream model names to optional aliases (name -> alias). Enter values manually for this provider family in this release.
descriptions.providerType: Choose which CLIProxyAPI provider family to import into.
descriptions.proxyUrl: Optional proxy URL used for this API key entry.

claudeApiKey.description: Use an Anthropic Claude API key style provider entry.
claudeApiKey.label: Claude API Key

codexApiKey.description: Use a Codex / OpenAI API key style provider entry.
codexApiKey.label: Codex API Key

geminiApiKey.description: Use a Google Gemini API key style provider entry.
geminiApiKey.label: Gemini API Key

openaiCompatibility.description: Use a standard OpenAI-compatible provider with a configurable provider name.
openaiCompatibility.label: OpenAI Compatibility

cliproxy.title: Import to CLIProxyAPI

copyKey.createNotSupported: This account does not support creating keys from this dialog.
copyKey.noKeyFoundAfterCreate: No key was found after creating one. Please try again.
copyKey.noKeysDescription: Create a default key quickly, or create a custom key with advanced settings.
copyKey.title: Key List

confirm.description: This will delete {{deleteCount}} account(s) across {{groups}} duplicate set(s).
confirm.title: Delete duplicate accounts

dedupeAccounts.description: Scan duplicate accounts by origin + user id, then delete duplicates after preview.
dedupeAccounts.manualPickHint: You can manually choose which account to keep in each set. Manual choices override the keep strategy.
dedupeAccounts.title: Duplicate account cleanup
dedupeAccounts.unscannableHint_one: {{count}} account could not be scanned and was skipped.
dedupeAccounts.unscannableHint_other: {{count}} accounts could not be scanned and were skipped.

delete.noResponse: Delete operation did not return successfully
delete.title: Delete Account
delete.warning: You are about to delete account {{accountName}}. Please verify before confirming to delete this account

firefox.popupLimitation: This feature cannot be used normally in the popup of Firefox browser. Please use the sidebar mode to add accounts
firefox.sidebarInstruction: Click on the extension icon in the browser toolbar, then select the 'Sidebar' option to open the sidebar mode

kiloCode.description: Generate Kilo Code / Roo Code provider profiles from your selected sites and tokens.

descriptions.modelId: Recommended per API key (Kilo Code typically requires a model ID). Defaults to the first model from this API key's upstream model list.

help.kiloV7ApiKeyEditorNote: After import, Kilo Code may show the provider API key field as empty. This is a known editor limitation: imported inline keys are stored separately from the editor authentication state and remain available at runtime.
help.kiloV7CatalogInstructions: Each selected API key becomes a provider with a readable name. It includes every normalized model ID discovered from that API plus any model ID entered manually for the provider; inclusion does not guarantee that every model works in every workflow. Choose the default model and, when exporting multiple providers, the default provider.
help.kiloV7CopyInstructions: Click "Copy provider config" to copy a mergeable top-level fragment containing both provider and model. Merge both fields into your settings JSON; the copied fragment is not a complete import file.
help.kiloV7DownloadInstructions: Click "Download Kilo 7.x settings", then import the downloaded kilo-settings.json from Kilo Code Settings → About Kilo Code → Import. Review the imported settings and save.
help.legacyCopyInstructions: Click "Copy legacy apiConfigs" and paste the content into providerProfiles.apiConfigs in the Roo Code or Kilo Code 5.x settings.
help.legacyDownloadInstructions: To get a complete settings file, click "Download legacy settings" to download kilo-code-settings.json, then import it using the settings import feature in the corresponding version.
help.legacySingleModelInstructions: Legacy Roo Code and Kilo Code 5.x exports support one model per profile. Select the model to use before copying or downloading.
help.perSiteDescription: Select sites to load tokens automatically. The first token is preselected, and you can select multiple tokens per site.

messages.createTokenBlockedFallback: Token creation was blocked. Check the site policy and try again.
messages.invalidProfile: This profile has an invalid base URL or missing API key. Update the profile before exporting.
messages.loadModelsFailed: Failed to load upstream models for this API key.
messages.loadTokensFailed: Failed to load tokens for this site.
messages.modelIdRequiredDescription_one: Select or enter a model ID for all selected API keys to enable export (missing: {{count}}).
messages.modelIdRequiredDescription_other: Select or enter a model ID for all selected API keys to enable export (missing: {{count}}).
messages.modelSearchLimited: Showing the first {{visible}} of {{count}} models. Keep typing to narrow the list.
messages.noModelsDescription: No upstream models were returned for this API key. Kilo Code typically requires a model ID — please enter one manually.
messages.nothingToExportDescription: Select at least one exportable token/site to enable copy/download.
messages.noTokensDescription: This site will be skipped until a token is created.
messages.settingsFileTooLargeMultiple: This file is too large for Kilo Code import. Select fewer providers, or copy the configuration and merge it manually.
messages.settingsFileTooLargeSingle: This file is too large for Kilo Code import. Copy the configuration and merge it manually.
messages.v7ProviderModelsRequired: Enter a model ID, retry discovery, or deselect this provider.

kiloCode.title: Export Kilo Code JSON

warning.description: The exported JSON contains API keys in plaintext. Store it securely and do not share it.
warning.title: Plaintext API keys

tempWindowFallbackReminder.descriptionDisabledTempWindowOnly: {{accountName}} needs a temporary popup window to open and pass protection so requests can complete successfully. Enable it in Settings > Data Refresh
tempWindowFallbackReminder.descriptionDisabledWithCookieInterceptor: {{accountName}} needs the protection-bypass flow on Firefox. A temporary popup window will open to obtain cookies, and Cookie Interceptor will attach them to requests. Enable it in Settings > Data Refresh
tempWindowFallbackReminder.descriptionPermissionTempWindowOnly: {{accountName}} needs permission to open a temporary popup window so requests can complete successfully. Grant it in Settings > Permissions
tempWindowFallbackReminder.descriptionPermissionWithCookieIntercept: {{accountName}} needs Cookie Interceptor permissions on Firefox. The temporary popup window must open to obtain cookies, and requests will attach them. Grant it in Settings > Permissions
tempWindowFallbackReminder.titleTempWindowOnly: Enable temporary window mode for requests

updateLog.missingSection: Couldn't load the changelog preview for v{{version}}. You can open the full changelog.
updateLog.title: What's New

modelListInput.title: Model List (name[, alias] one per line):

multiSelect.noOptionsAllowCustom: No options available. Type to create one

navigation.externalCheckinAllHint: Open unchecked external check-ins. Ctrl/Cmd: open all. Shift: open in new window. Ctrl/Cmd+Shift: open all in new window.

optionsSearch.dialogDescription: Search pages, settings tabs, and settings items
optionsSearch.emptyDescription: Try another title, keyword, or technical alias.
optionsSearch.idleDescription: Type a setting name, keyword, or technical alias to start searching.

popupInterruption.description: The popup closed while account auto-detect was running. Use the sidebar for a steadier add-account flow.
